# Princess Pink

> Princess Pink hosts discreet, consent-first adult events — glory hole nights, gang bangs, and adult theatre takeovers. Strictly 18+.

Princess Pink is an Australian adult-events platform that curates
vetted, consent-first nights at adult theatres and private venues,
alongside a boutique store of photo sets, videos, and an all-access
subscription.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Upcoming public events, host bio, and co-host program.
- [Store](/store): Photo sets, videos, bundles, and the All-Access Pass.
- [Our Standards](/conduct): Consent-first philosophy, zero-tolerance harassment policy, and vetting.
- [Compliance](/compliance): Venue and event compliance requirements for hosts.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): Personal and sensitive-health-information handling.
- [Legal](/legal): Code of Conduct and Privacy Policy summary.
